validation_results.command:
PYTHONPATH=repository/src python3 - <<'PY2'
import json
from pathlib import Path
from drd_harness.validators.phase_gate import canonical_lock_root, validate_build_lock_readiness
lock = json.loads(Path('control/locks/P3_BUILD_LOCK.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
findings = validate_build_lock_readiness(lock)
assert findings == [], findings
assert lock['root_sha256'] == canonical_lock_root(lock)
print('PASS')
PY2
validation_results.summary: validate_build_lock_readiness returns PASS with zero findings for control/locks/P3_BUILD_LOCK.json

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY2'
import hashlib
import json
from pathlib import Path
lock = json.loads(Path('control/locks/P3_BUILD_LOCK.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for entry in lock['files']:
    assert hashlib.sha256(Path(entry['path']).read_bytes()).hexdigest() == entry['sha256'], entry['path']
print('PASS')
PY2
validation_results.summary: all 202 file entries listed in P3_BUILD_LOCK hash to current file values

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY2'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root = Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-BUILD-LOCK-CREATION-RESULT')
scope = json.loads((root / 'SCOPE_REPORT.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for path in scope['actual_writes']:
    assert Path(path).is_file(), path
assert scope['forbidden_write_violations'] == []
assert scope['created_control_lock'] == 'control/locks/P3_BUILD_LOCK.json'
assert scope['p1_files_modified_by_lock_creation'] is False
assert scope['p2_files_modified_by_lock_creation'] is False
assert scope['p3_phase_manifest_modified_by_lock_creation'] is False
print('PASS')
PY2
validation_results.summary: scope report records only the authorized P3_BUILD_LOCK and result candidate writes
